header.title: Search saved creator profiles in one request.
header.description: Add multiple Instagram usernames, review which creators are already stored in the platform, and open a complete view for each match.

input.title: Search creators by username
input.tooltip: Paste a list, press Enter, or separate usernames with commas. Usernames are normalized to lowercase and any leading @ is removed automatically before the search runs.
input.label: Instagram usernames
input.staleBadge: Input changed, search again to refresh

validation.invalidRule: Use lowercase letters, numbers, periods or underscores, up to 30 characters.
validation.overflow: You can search up to 50 usernames per request.

empty.title: No creator snapshots matched this search.
empty.description: Try another set of usernames or verify that those creators are already available in the saved creator data.

expired.title: Profiles need updates
expired.description: These creators exist in saved data, but their stored profile data needs to be updated. They are highlighted in yellow above and in the results list so you can identify which saved profiles need to be refreshed.

missing.title: Usernames not found
missing.description: These usernames were not found in the saved creator data. They are also highlighted in red above.

jobs.title: Mining for creators.
jobs.description: Active and recent scrape jobs are kept locally on this browser.

errors.duplicateActiveJob: An active scrape job already exists for these usernames.

progress.review: Click to review the terminal result.

history.title: Search history
history.description: Keep the last ready username lists one click away.

dialog.title: Search history
dialog.description: Reuse any of the last 20 successful ready username lists.

guide.title: Search guide
guide.description: Quick guidance for how creator search works and how results are presented.

multiCreator.title: Multi-creator search
multiCreator.description: Search the saved creator records for the usernames you enter, up to 50 at a time.

savedDetails.title: Saved profile details
savedDetails.description: Each result card opens a detailed view with profile information, metrics, posts, and reels when they are available.

issueHighlighting.title: Immediate issue highlighting
issueHighlighting.description: Invalid usernames and names that are not found are highlighted directly in the tags input and listed in a dedicated block below.

card.noBiography: No biography available for this creator.

analysis.title: AI analysis
analysis.description: Saved content categories and creator roles associated with this profile.

metrics.title: Metrics
metrics.description: Saved creator metrics arranged to match the report view used across the product.
metrics.empty: No metrics were saved for this creator yet.

posts.description_one: Saved posts from {{count}} update, latest on {{date}}.
posts.description_other: Saved posts from {{count}} updates, latest on {{date}}.

reels.description_one: Saved reels from {{count}} update, latest on {{date}}.
reels.description_other: Saved reels from {{count}} updates, latest on {{date}}.
